summary: Feasibility Studio Turkish mobile MVP — full end-to-end pass. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed (health, auth login success/401 Turkish error, /auth/me, protected 401, schools list=3, scenarios s1=2, inputs GET/PUT persistence, report KPI computation validated with known inputs). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): login screen renders with Turkish welcome 'Ücret Belirleme Modülüne hoş geldiniz.' and demo hint; login with demo@feasibility.io/demo1234 navigates to Schools list showing all 3 seeded schools (İstanbul/Ankara/İzmir); tapping school opens Senaryolar list with Taslak/Gönderildi badges; tapping scenario opens editor with all 6 tabs (Temel Bilgiler, Kapasite, İK, Gelirler, Giderler, Rapor); Save button shows 'Kayıtlı' initially, flips to 'Kaydet' after editing kap-toplam in Kapasite tab, saves via PUT and reverts to 'Kayıtlı'; Rapor tab loads and shows all 4 KPI cards (Toplam Gelir ₺66M, Toplam Gider ₺10M, Faaliyet Karı ₺56M, Kâr Marjı 84.8%) reflecting saved inputs; logout from schools returns to login screen. No red screens, no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Backend uses in-memory storage (data resets on backend restart) — expected for demo mock, already documented in the top of server.py.

Minor: 'islektme' key (giderler) appears to be a typo of 'işletme' but is used consistently in backend + frontend, so functionality is intact. Consider renaming to 'isletme' in a future refactor for cleanliness.
Minor: Backend header comment references EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL but the actual env key used by the client is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — comment-only inconsistency, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: None. Used the two demo users seeded in server.py; backend test overwrites sc1a inputs to validate report math (acceptable since demo backend is in-memory and stateless across restarts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL comes from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in frontend/.env (Kubernetes ingress /api → 8001). Two demo users: demo@feasibility.io/demo1234 (user) and admin@feasibility.io/admin1234 (admin). Seed: 3 schools (s1/s2/s3), s1 has 2 scenarios (sc1a draft, sc1b submitted). Backend PUT /schools/{id}/scenarios/{id}/inputs mutates in-memory state and will affect subsequent runs until backend restart. Frontend uses expo-router (/login, /schools, /school/[id], /scenario/[schoolId]/[scenarioId]). All interactive elements have testIDs. Note: state badges 'Taslak'/'Gönderildi' and KPI titles ('Toplam Gelir' etc.) use CSS textTransform:uppercase — Playwright inner_text may return uppercase; assert on testID visibility instead of text case.
